title: NCaan 2pk Deluxe Hand Scrubbing Brush Heavy Duty with Stiff Bristles & Non-Slip Soft Grip Handle-Household Cleaning Brush for Indoor & Outdoor, Bathroom, Kitchen, Carpet, Floor, Bath,Car (Assorted, 2)
features: ✔ PREMIUM QUALITY: Introducing our stylish and premium quality deluxe scrubbing brush with stiff bristles and non-slip grip handle for vigorous scrubbing to remove stubborn stains. Specially designed for both domestic and professional environments to easily clean mineral deposits, hard water, mould, mildew and other dirt without breaking a sweat.

✔ COMFORTABLE and SAFE TO USE: The stylish iron-shaped scrubbing brush features an ergonomic soft non-slip grip handle for increased comfort and effective cleaning. The ergonomic design allows you to scrub safely without having to strain or twist your wrist in uncomfortable angles. The floor scrubbing brush comfortably fits in left or right hand.

✔ EXTRA STIFF BRISTLES: The durable scrubbing brush is hard wearing and is weather resistant with stiff bristles. The deluxe scrubber brush provides stability for heavy duty scrubbing to remove stubborn dirt and grime with ease.

✔ VERSATILE USES: The household scrubbing brush is versatile and effective cleaning tool that can be used indoors or outdoors. The heavy-duty floor scrubbing brush is designed to easily and effectively move through the grime and stain with minimal effort. The heavy-duty floor brush is suitable for cleaning various applications, including decking, grout, tile floor, carpets, sports equipment, benches, marble floor, and much more.

✔ SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: Customer satisfaction is our priority. Our products accompany a 100% satisfaction guarantee. Although we are completely confident that you will find our products better than your expectations but if you aren’t happy with the purchase for any reason, contact us to resolve the issue to your satisfaction.
